svg.title: KAALA system architecture — full loop from patient to care
svg.desc: End-to-end flow showing how KAALA connects patients, ASHA workers, doctors, NGOs and CSR through Gemma 4 on-device intelligence

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the patient role in KAALA')
sendPrompt('How does KAALA help the patient family member?')
sendPrompt('What does the ASHA worker see and do in KAALA?')
sendPrompt('How does the async doctor loop work in KAALA?')
sendPrompt('How does CSR funding connect to KAALA?')
sendPrompt('Explain the PII vault in KAALA')
g.text: PII vault — identity stays on device

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the video capture and frame selection work?')
g.text: 4-sec video × 6 oral sites → best 2–3 frames kept, raw video deleted

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does longitudinal EHR integration work in KAALA?')
g.text: Past visits, lesion maps, doctor notes → injected into Gemma 4 context

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain ROI explanation and quantitative lesion markers')
sendPrompt('How does hypothesis generation and uncertainty annotation work?')
sendPrompt('How does health and progress tracking work in KAALA?')
sendPrompt('What does the patient output look like in local language?')
sendPrompt('What does the ASHA worker clinical output look like?')
sendPrompt('What does the doctor clinical package contain?')
sendPrompt('How does the offline to online sync work in KAALA?')
g.text: Offline: patient leaves with spoken care plan, case queued · Online: syncs in 90 sec

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What happens offline when patient leaves?')
g.text: Spoken care plan · Savitri gets action

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What happens when KAALA syncs online?')
sendPrompt('How does the async doctor voice note loop work?')
sendPrompt('How does the patient hear the doctor voice note?')
sendPrompt('How does NGO and CSR funding integrate into KAALA?')
sendPrompt('What does treatment completion look like and how is it tracked?')

svg.text: With patient consent: anonymised data → dataset repo → scientific research
↑ every case makes the next model smarter
